body.title: Inference — single-entry, budget-gated, tiered model routing (Proxy device)
body.summary: The enduring intent of inference is a SINGLE entry point that callers hit without choosing a model or tier, behind which a tiered escalation cascade routes from cheapest-capable up to most-capable, gated by budget and provider health. In UnseenUniversity this lives in the inference rack DEVICE (the Proxy): a capability graph + rules engine pick a model for a purpose, a budget ledger/gate enforces spend caps, and provider-health monitoring routes around outages. Per the standing rule, ALL inference goes through the Proxy — no device makes direct provider calls.

key_concepts.name: single entry point
key_concepts.what: callers ask for a result by purpose/level; no tier or model string leaks to the caller

key_concepts.name: capability graph + rules engine
key_concepts.what: maps a purpose to a candidate model set and picks per rules; model_alternatives provides fallbacks

key_concepts.name: budget gate + ledger
key_concepts.what: spend is metered and capped; cloud calls can be blocked when over budget (DS/Igor cost constraints)

key_concepts.name: provider health routing
key_concepts.what: provider_health + health_monitor route around degraded/unavailable providers

body.status_notes: HISTORICAL DIVERGENCE FROM SOURCE DOC: subsystem_inference.md (2026-03-14) described Igor's INTERNAL gateway with a direct-call t1-t6 tier ladder (Ollama / OR gpt-4o-mini / OR claude / Anthropic-direct). That legacy path still has code at devices/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py (+ inference_ollama.py / inference_openrouter.py / reasoners/), but it makes DIRECT provider calls and is SUPERSEDED by the Proxy device under the 'Inference Proxy only — no direct calls ever' rule. This intent-point is built around the live Proxy; the doc's specific tier-to-model table is NOT current and is recorded here only as historical context.
body.provenance: Distilled (and re-homed onto the live Proxy device) from TheIgors.archive/lab/design_docs/subsystem_inference.md 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation).
